calendar.matters:
Petition For Court Authorization To Combine Trusts With Similar Terms
Off Calendar Apr-01-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The matter was taken under submission without hearing.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition For Court Authorization To Combine Trusts With Similar Terms
Off Calendar Feb-19-2015 Continued To Mar-02-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Turrini appeared by telephone for Sarah Hummingbird (Trustee).

The Court informed Counsel that page 1-1 of Sarah Hummingbird Trust and the petition referred to in the order for final settlement in Justine estate were missing. Mr. Turrini stated that the petition was filed in the supplement and that he was not aware of the request to have page 1-1 filed. Counsel was directed to file the missing page. The Petition for Court Authorization to Combine Trusts With Similar Terms was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Clark. (Not Reported)

As of February 19, 2015 the missing pages have not been filed. The petition for court authorization to combine trusts with similar terms was continued to March 2, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If the requested documents are filed by February 25, 2015, no appearance will be required. Leslie Gomez.
